cases.text: The international wire is still pending and the recipient has not received the funds.
Money left my account yesterday, but it never reached the beneficiary.
Our supplier is waiting because the cross-border payment remains in processing.
The music was so loud that we could not hold a conversation over dinner.
Everyone at the table had to shout because the dining room volume was overwhelming.
Conversation became impossible once the speakers were turned up.
Our analyst role cannot export reports even though the permission is enabled.
Access controls say the teammate may download data, but the export button stays locked.
Role settings are inconsistent and authorized users are blocked from reports.
Our new squad keeps facing coordinated top-rank teams in one-sided matches.
Beginners are repeatedly paired against veteran groups and stop queuing.
The ranking system creates unfair lobbies between novices and experienced players.
The meal arrived cold and the fries were soggy after the courier delay.
Our pizza was chilled by the time the delivery reached the door.
Late transport left the takeaway lukewarm and unpleasant to eat.
There was no hot water in the shower during our entire hotel stay.
The bathroom tap stayed cold because the building boiler had failed.
We could not take a warm shower and maintenance never restored the water heater.
The shop accepted my return but the refund has not appeared on my card.
I sent the item back weeks ago and am still waiting for reimbursement.
The returned product was received, yet the merchant has not credited the purchase.
I arrived on time for the appointment but waited ninety minutes to see the doctor.
The consultation started more than an hour late with no update from reception.
Patients remained in the waiting room long after their scheduled medical visits.
